title: Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action
summary: Gemini 3.5 text and multi-colored star icon on an abstract blue background.
title_es: Google presenta Gemini 3.5 con capacidades de acción
bajada: Google lanzó Gemini 3.5, su nuevo modelo de inteligencia frontera con capacidades mejoradas de acción. El modelo representa el siguiente paso en la evolución de la línea Gemini para realizar tareas más complejas.
bajada_en: Google launched Gemini 3.5, its new frontier intelligence model with enhanced action capabilities. The model represents the next step in the Gemini line's evolution for handling more complex tasks.

title: May 19, 2026AnnouncementsKPMG integrates Claude across its core business and workforce of more than 276,000 in strategic alliance
summary: Announcements KPMG integrates Claude across its core business and workforce of more than 276,000 in strategic alliance May 19, 2026 KPMG—one of the world's largest professional services firms for audit, tax, legal, and advisory services across 138 countries and territories—has announced a global alliance with Anthropic to bring Claude into the heart of its business. As part of this alliance, KPMG is embedding Claude inside Digital Gateway, the software KPMG's people and clients use to do the actual work—starting with new tools for tax and legal clients. And every one of KPMG's 276,000+ employees globally will gain access to Claude. Anthropic is also naming KPMG a preferred partner for private equity, and the two companies will build new Claude-powered products together for PE portfolio companies. KPMG and Claude KPMG helps organizations in various industries work together to transform, innovate, and effectively compete in tomorrow’s fast-changing world. Integrating AI across its core business furthers this mission—and requires trust and diligence. “At KPMG, we’re innovating and redefining how work gets done,” said Bill Thomas, Global Chairman and CEO, KPMG International. “This global alliance with Anthropic reflects our shared commitment to responsible AI, prioritizing security, trust, and governance as KPMG firms scale these capabilities to our clients and people around the world.” “KPMG works in industries where accuracy, accountability, and trust aren’t optional, and they're applying the same standard to AI. They’re rolling Claude out to 276,000 people across the business, and using it for client work in tax and private equity. They're also bringing it into cybersecurity, where it helps find and fix vulnerabilities. That's what a firm-wide commitment to AI looks like, and we're proud to be the partner they chose,” said Daniela Amodei, Co-founder and President of Anthropic. Claude for 276,000+ KPMG people Beyond the client-facing platform, every KPMG employee—all
title_es: KPMG integra Claude en su operación global con 276.000 empleados
bajada: KPMG y Anthropic anunciaron una alianza estratégica para integrar Claude en la infraestructura central de KPMG, llegando a más de 276.000 empleados. El acuerdo incluye herramientas personalizadas para servicios fiscales y legales, y posiciona a KPMG como socio preferente para private equity.
bajada_en: KPMG and Anthropic announced a strategic alliance to integrate Claude into KPMG's core infrastructure, reaching over 276,000 employees globally. The deal includes custom tools for tax and legal services, positioning KPMG as a preferred partner for private equity.

title: I/O 2026: Welcome to the agentic Gemini era
summary: a series of colorful icons representing Google I/O against a black background
title_es: Google anuncia la era de Gemini agentes en Google I/O 2026
bajada: Google presentó en Google I/O 2026 su visión de agentes inteligentes basados en Gemini. El evento marca un cambio estratégico hacia sistemas más autónomos y capaces de ejecutar acciones complejas.
bajada_en: Google unveiled its vision for intelligent agents powered by Gemini at Google I/O 2026. The event marks a strategic shift toward more autonomous systems capable of executing complex actions.

title: Stability AI releases a new audio model that can create six-minute songs
summary: Stability Audio 3.0 small model can run on-device and generate two-minute long tracks
title_es: Stability AI lanza modelo de audio que genera canciones de 6 minutos
bajada: Stability Audio 3.0 permite generar pistas de audio de hasta 6 minutos y cuenta con una versión pequeña que funciona en dispositivos locales. Esta es una herramienta importante para creadores y desarrolladores que necesitan síntesis de audio escalable.
bajada_en: Stability Audio 3.0 can generate audio tracks up to six minutes long with an on-device small model version available. This is a significant tool for creators and developers needing scalable audio synthesis.

title: Advancing content provenance for a safer, more transparent AI ecosystem
summary: OpenAI advances AI content provenance with Content Credentials, SynthID, and a verification tool to help people identify and trust AI-generated media.
title_es: OpenAI avanza en verificación de contenido generado por IA
bajada: OpenAI introdujo Content Credentials y SynthID para ayudar a identificar y verificar contenido generado por IA. Estas herramientas buscan mejorar la transparencia y confianza en el ecosistema de medios generados por IA.
bajada_en: OpenAI introduced Content Credentials and SynthID to help identify and verify AI-generated content. These tools aim to improve transparency and trust in the AI-generated media ecosystem.

title: Figma adds an AI assistant to its collaborative canvas
summary: Figma's new AI assistant will be first available on Figma Design
title_es: Figma integra asistente de IA en su lienzo colaborativo
bajada: Figma presentó un asistente de IA que se integrará en su plataforma de diseño colaborativo. La herramienta permitirá a los diseñadores automatizar tareas repetitivas directamente en el flujo de trabajo.
bajada_en: Figma introduced an AI assistant integrated into its collaborative design platform. The tool will enable designers to automate repetitive tasks directly in their workflow.

title: If Google can’t make AI agents useful, maybe no one can
summary: For years, tech companies have promised AI will give everyone a capable personal assistant but delivered something more like a clueless intern. Over the past six months, that has started to change, thanks largely to the viral open-source AI agent platform OpenClaw. And among the top AI labs now chasing similar success, one seems particularly […]
title_es: Los agentes de IA aceleran su evolución hacia utilidad real
bajada: The Verge analiza cómo los agentes de IA finalmente están siendo útiles gracias a plataformas como OpenClaw, un proyecto open-source que inspiró a los principales laboratorios. El momento marca un cambio después de años de promesas incumplidas sobre asistentes personales.
bajada_en: The Verge examines how AI agents are finally becoming useful thanks to platforms like OpenClaw, an open-source project that inspired major labs. The moment marks a shift after years of unfulfilled promises about personal assistants.

title: It’s make or break time for AI labeling systems
summary: We're about to find out if the systems designed to make deepfakes and AI-generated content easy to spot are actually up to snuff. SynthID and C2PA Content Credentials, two distinct technologies for invisibly tagging image, video, and audio files with information about their origins, are getting their biggest expansion to date, and with it, the […]
title_es: SynthID y Content Credentials se prueban a escala
bajada: SynthID y Content Credentials están expandiéndose significativamente para etiquetar de forma invisible imágenes, videos y audio con información de origen. La iniciativa es crítica para validar si estos sistemas pueden realmente detectar deepfakes y contenido generado por IA.
bajada_en: SynthID and Content Credentials are expanding significantly to invisibly tag images, videos, and audio with origin information. The initiative is critical to validate if these systems can actually detect deepfakes and AI-generated content.

title: AI search startups are blowing up
summary: AI search has quietly become one of the most attractive targets in consumer AI.
title_es: Startups de búsqueda con IA se multiplican en el mercado
bajada: La búsqueda basada en IA se ha convertido silenciosamente en uno de los segmentos más atractivos de la IA de consumidor. Múltiples startups están compitiendo para capturar este mercado en crecimiento acelerado.
bajada_en: AI-powered search has quietly become one of the most attractive segments in consumer AI. Multiple startups are competing to capture this rapidly growing market.

title: Mistral AI acquires Emmi AI
summary: Article URL:https://www.emmi.ai/news/mistral-ai-acquires-emmi-aiComments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48197995Points: 302# Comments: 91
title_es: Mistral AI adquiere Emmi AI
bajada: Mistral AI anunció la adquisición de Emmi AI, expandiendo sus capacidades y equipo. La compra forma parte de la estrategia de Mistral para consolidar su posición como lab de IA competitivo.
bajada_en: Mistral AI announced the acquisition of Emmi AI, expanding its capabilities and team. The purchase is part of Mistral's strategy to consolidate its position as a competitive AI lab.

title: I/O 2026
summary: At Google I/O 2026, we shared how we’re making AI more helpful for everyone. See everything we announced.
title_es: Google I/O 2026: resumen de anuncios de IA
bajada: Google compartió todos los anuncios de Google I/O 2026 sobre cómo están haciendo la IA más útil para todos. El evento incluyó múltiples iniciativas en modelos, herramientas y desarrollador.
bajada_en: Google shared all Google I/O 2026 announcements on making AI more helpful for everyone. The event included multiple initiatives across models, tools, and developer platforms.

title: NVIDIA and Google Cloud Empower the Next Wave of AI Builders
summary: At this year’s Google I/O conference, NVIDIA and Google Cloud are accelerating the work of more than 100,000 developers in the companies’ joint developer community, which provides curated learning paths, hands-on labs and events that help them build using the full-stack NVIDIA AI platform on Google Cloud.  Launched at Google I/O last year, the community […]
title_es: NVIDIA y Google Cloud aceleran comunidad de 100.000 desarrolladores
bajada: NVIDIA y Google Cloud expandieron su comunidad conjunta de desarrolladores a más de 100.000 miembros con rutas de aprendizaje y laboratorios prácticos. La iniciativa facilita que los desarrolladores construyan usando el stack completo de NVIDIA en Google Cloud.
bajada_en: NVIDIA and Google Cloud expanded their joint developer community to over 100,000 members with learning paths and hands-on labs. The initiative helps developers build using NVIDIA's full-stack platform on Google Cloud.

title: OlmoEarth v1.1: A more efficient family of Earth observation models
title_es: Hugging Face lanza OlmoEarth v1.1 más eficiente
bajada: Hugging Face y Allen AI presentaron OlmoEarth v1.1, una familia mejorada de modelos para observación terrestre. Los nuevos modelos ofrecen mayor eficiencia para análisis de imágenes satelitales y aplicaciones geoespaciales.
bajada_en: Hugging Face and Allen AI introduced OlmoEarth v1.1, an improved family of Earth observation models. The new models offer better efficiency for satellite imagery analysis and geospatial applications.

title: Introducing OpenAI for Singapore
summary: OpenAI for Singapore launches a multi-year AI partnership to expand deployment, build local talent, and support businesses and public services with AI.
title_es: OpenAI expande operaciones con oficina en Singapur
bajada: OpenAI anunció el lanzamiento de OpenAI para Singapur como parte de una alianza multianual. La iniciativa busca expandir la adopción de IA, desarrollar talento local y apoyar a negocios y servicios públicos.
bajada_en: OpenAI announced the launch of OpenAI for Singapore as part of a multi-year partnership. The initiative aims to expand AI adoption, build local talent, and support businesses and public services.

title: Gemini CLI will stop working from June 18, 2026
summary: Article URL:https://developers.googleblog.com/an-important-update-transitioning-gemini-cli-to-antigravity-cli/Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48196867Points: 321# Comments: 167
title_es: Google descontinúa Gemini CLI el 18 de junio
bajada: Google anunció que Gemini CLI dejará de funcionar el 18 de junio de 2026, migrando a una nueva herramienta llamada Antigravity CLI. Los desarrolladores deben actualizar sus flujos de trabajo antes de la fecha de corte.
bajada_en: Google announced that Gemini CLI will stop working on June 18, 2026, migrating to a new tool called Antigravity CLI. Developers must update their workflows before the cutoff date.

title: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry
summary: An OpenAI model solved the 80-year-old unit distance problem, disproving a major conjecture in discrete geometry and marking a milestone in AI-driven mathematics.
title_es: Modelo de OpenAI resuelve conjetura de 80 años en geometría discreta
bajada: Un modelo de IA de OpenAI ha demostrado una conjetura central en geometría discreta, resolviendo el problema de la distancia unitaria que llevaba 80 años sin solución. Este hito marca un avance significativo en matemáticas asistidas por IA.
bajada_en: An OpenAI model has solved a central conjecture in discrete geometry, disproving the 80-year-old unit distance problem. This milestone demonstrates AI's growing capability in advancing pure mathematics research.

title: Anthropic will pay xAI $1.25B per month for compute
summary: Elon Musk's xAI surprised the AI world when it made a deal to sell compute to Anthropic. Now we know how much it's worth.
title_es: Anthropic pagará 1.25B$/mes a xAI por capacidad de cómputo
bajada: Anthropic firmó un acuerdo con xAI de Elon Musk para comprar capacidad de cómputo por 1.25 mil millones de dólares mensuales. El deal revela la magnitud de la competencia por recursos de infraestructura en la industria de IA.
bajada_en: Anthropic signed a deal with Elon Musk's xAI to purchase $1.25 billion per month in compute capacity. The agreement highlights the fierce competition for computational resources among AI companies.

title: xAI burned $6.4B last year. SpaceX’s IPO filing shows why the spending is far from over
summary: SpaceX's IPO filing reveals xAI lost $6.4 billion in 2025 while planning a massive Grok expansion — offering the first public look at Elon Musk's AI financials and more details about his ambitions.
title_es: xAI perdió 6.4B$ en 2025, según revelación en IPO de SpaceX
bajada: El documento de IPO de SpaceX reveló que xAI quemó 6.4 mil millones de dólares en 2025 mientras planea una expansión masiva de Grok. Los datos ofrecen el primer vistazo público a las finanzas de Musk en IA y sus ambiciones futuras.
bajada_en: SpaceX's IPO filing revealed that xAI lost $6.4 billion in 2025 while planning a massive Grok expansion. The disclosure provides the first public insight into Musk's AI financials and expansion plans.

title: Nvidia posts another record quarter, reveals $43 billion of holdings in startups
summary: Nvidia announced another record revenue figure after market close on Wednesday, but forecasted that revenue growth would slow in the following quarter.
title_es: Nvidia reporta nuevo récord trimestral y revela 43B$ en startups
bajada: Nvidia anunció otro trimestre récord en ingresos, aunque proyectó una desaceleración en el crecimiento para el próximo período. La empresa también reveló que mantiene 43 mil millones de dólares en inversiones en startups de IA.
bajada_en: Nvidia announced another record quarter but forecasted slower revenue growth ahead. The company also disclosed $43 billion in startup holdings across the AI ecosystem.

title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
summary: Image with the words "Ready, Set, I/O" and a colorful Gemini logo
title_es: Google anuncia 100 nuevas características en I/O 2026
bajada: Google reveló un centenar de anuncios durante su conferencia I/O 2026, incluyendo avances en IA con Gemini. La magnitud de los anuncios refleja el enfoque estratégico de la empresa en integrar IA en todos sus productos.
bajada_en: Google announced 100 new features at I/O 2026, featuring major Gemini AI integrations. The breadth of announcements underscores the company's strategic focus on AI across its product portfolio.

title: Re. what ever happened to Cohere’s Command-A series of models?
summary: Hey everyone, Nick Frosst here from Cohere. A few months ago Aidan (my cofounder)left a commentin here about our Command series and how we were working on some more powerful, open-weights models behind the scenes. We just launched Command A+ and we wanted to share it with you guys.TLDR is we built a really efficient model. It’s our first MoE model, which is exciting. There’s obvs work to do on top-line performance but it’s easily looking like one of the fastest and most responsive models in our category. We also pulled off some incredible quantization work so it runs really well on even 1 or 2 GPUs.Like with R7B, we really prioritized making the model practical, so smaller teams and devs could realistically use it to build the kind of agents we ship for our platform customers. That’s also why it’s under Apache 2.0. Just total, near unfettered access to a pretty awesome model.We’re enterprise-first but honestly, we get so much out of our open-source community that makes us more innovative and creative. The feedback you give will almost certainly influence how we think about models and product going forward…... as it already has here from getting called out the last time haha.So, don’t hold back. Share your thoughts, your projects, whatever. You can see the full details herehttps://cohere.com/blog/command-a-plusWe appreciate you :)submitted by/u/nick_frosst[link][comments]
title_es: Cohere lanza Command A+, su primer modelo MoE open-source
bajada: Cohere anunció Command A+, su primer modelo de mezcla de expertos (MoE) open-source bajo Apache 2.0, optimizado para eficiencia y compatible con 1-2 GPUs. El modelo busca empoderar a equipos pequeños y developers para construir agentes prácticos.
bajada_en: Cohere launched Command A+, its first open-source Mixture of Experts model under Apache 2.0, optimized for efficiency and running on 1-2 GPUs. The model aims to enable smaller teams and developers to build practical agents.

title: Musk’s xAI is being sued over its data center generators — now it’s buying $2.8B more
summary: Elon Musk's xAI said it will buy $2.8 billion worth of natural gas turbines over the next three years, according to SpaceX's IPO filing.
title_es: xAI comprará 2.8B$ en turbinas de gas pese a demandas pendientes
bajada: xAI anunció la compra de 2.8 mil millones de dólares en turbinas de gas natural durante tres años, según revelaron documentos de IPO de SpaceX. La inversión continúa mientras enfrenta litigios por generadores en sus datacenters.
bajada_en: xAI announced plans to purchase $2.8 billion worth of natural gas turbines over three years, revealed in SpaceX's IPO filing. The investment continues despite pending lawsuits over existing datacenter generators.

title: How Ramp engineers accelerate code review with Codex
summary: How Ramp engineers use Codex with GPT-5.5 to review code and ship improvements, allowing them to get substantive feedback in minutes instead of hours.
title_es: Ramp acelera code review con Codex y GPT-5.5
bajada: Ramp compartió cómo sus ingenieros usan Codex con GPT-5.5 para revisar código y acelerar el shipping de mejoras, obteniendo feedback sustancial en minutos en lugar de horas. El caso de uso muestra aplicaciones prácticas de IA en workflows de desarrollo.
bajada_en: Ramp engineers use Codex with GPT-5.5 to streamline code review, getting substantive feedback in minutes instead of hours. The case study demonstrates practical AI applications in development workflows.

title: You can now remix other people’s YouTube Shorts with AI
summary: Google announced a new YouTube Shorts Remix feature that lets users restyle clips or even insert themselves into other people's videos using Gemini Omni. Now, at the bottom of a YouTube Short, when you click the remix icon, you'll see an option to "reimagine" it. Here, you can prompt Gemini to turn a video into […]
title_es: YouTube Shorts ahora permite remixar videos con IA Gemini
bajada: Google lanzó una nueva función de Remix en YouTube Shorts que usa Gemini Omni para permitir que usuarios restilizen clips o se inserten a sí mismos en videos de otros. La herramienta abre nuevas posibilidades de creatividad colaborativa asistida por IA.
bajada_en: Google launched YouTube Shorts Remix, powered by Gemini Omni, letting users restyle videos and insert themselves into others' content. The feature enables new forms of AI-assisted collaborative creativity.

title: Google Search’s AI evolution includes more ads
summary: Google's AI-powered Search era apparently also extends to its ads. Now, when you look for a product in Search, Google's Gemini AI model will surface relevant items and generate a "custom explainer" about why you should purchase a specific one. The update comes just one day after Google revealed a new Search box for larger, […]
title_es: Google Search integra más anuncios en su era impulsada por IA
bajada: Google actualizó su búsqueda impulsada por IA para que Gemini genere explicadores personalizados sobre productos y muestre anuncios relevantes. La integración de ads en la experiencia de IA busca monetizar mejor los resultados de búsqueda.
bajada_en: Google's AI-powered Search now surfaces product recommendations and generates custom purchase explainers with relevant ads. The integration aims to monetize the AI search experience more effectively.

title: I Gave My OpenClaw Agent a Physical Body
summary: The coding skills of AI models are about to make it much easier to build and deploy robots.
title_es: OpenClaw Agent gana cuerpo físico con habilidades de codificación IA
bajada: Las habilidades de codificación de modelos IA están facilitando la construcción y despliegue de robots, como demuestra OpenClaw Agent con su cuerpo físico. La convergencia de IA y robótica abre nuevas aplicaciones en automatización.
bajada_en: AI models' coding skills are making it easier to build and deploy robots, as demonstrated by OpenClaw Agent. The convergence of AI and robotics enables new automation applications.

title: Formal Verification Gates for AI Coding Loops
summary: Article URL:https://reubenbrooks.dev/blog/structural-backpressure-beats-smarter-agents/Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48209323Points: 93# Comments: 22
title_es: Puertas de verificación formal para loops de IA en código
bajada: Un artículo en Hacker News explora cómo la verificación formal puede mejorar la seguridad de loops de código impulsados por IA. La técnica aborda desafíos en asegurar que agentes de IA escriban código confiable.
bajada_en: A research article discusses how formal verification can improve the safety of AI-driven coding loops. The approach addresses challenges in ensuring AI agents produce reliable code.

title: Testing distributed systems with AI agents
summary: Article URL:https://github.com/shenli/distributed-system-testingComments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48208685Points: 73# Comments: 10
title_es: Sistemas distribuidos de testing con agentes IA
bajada: Un proyecto open-source en GitHub demuestra el uso de agentes IA para testear sistemas distribuidos. La iniciativa explora cómo la IA puede automatizar pruebas complejas en infraestructura distribuida.
bajada_en: An open-source project on GitHub demonstrates using AI agents to test distributed systems. The initiative explores how AI can automate complex testing for distributed infrastructure.

title: Google publishes exploit code threatening millions of Chromium users
summary: Google publishes exploit code before patch, reported 29 months earlier, is fixed.
title_es: Google publica código de exploits en navegadores Chromium
bajada: Google publicó código de explotación de una vulnerabilidad en Chromium antes de que todos los usuarios recibieran parches, pese a que el problema fue reportado 29 meses antes. La acción genera preocupación sobre prácticas de divulgación de seguridad.
bajada_en: Google published exploit code for a Chromium vulnerability before patches reached all users, despite the issue being reported 29 months earlier. The move raises concerns about security disclosure practices.

title: A new experiment brings better group meetings to Google Beam
summary: A small group meeting featuring two in-room participants and three participants on-screen.
title_es: Google Beam mejora experiencia de reuniones grupales con IA
bajada: Google anunció mejoras en Google Beam para potenciar reuniones grupales con capacidades de IA. Los avances buscan mejorar la colaboración entre participantes presenciales y remotos.
bajada_en: Google announced improvements to Google Beam for better group meeting experiences powered by AI. The updates aim to enhance collaboration between in-room and remote participants.
